response.text:
ACCEPT
rationale: Requestor is 0.15 below safety threshold (0.10 vs 0.25 minimum), urgency is critical, and balanced sharing policy supports neighborhood resilience during extended outage without breaching my own safety margin.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=balanced, share_min_soc_frac=0.25, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Three neighbors remain critically low; geographic round-robin sharing is sustaining neighborhood resilience without compromising my safety margin during the extended outage..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
